message:
feat(freeze): Add 25+ opcodes to trampoline for broader function coverage

Trampoline now supports:
- Arguments: get_arg0-3, get_arg (variable)
- Integers: push_minus1, push_0-7, push_i8/i16/i32
- Arithmetic: mul, div, mod (in addition to existing add/sub)
- Comparisons: lt, gt, gte, eq, neq (in addition to existing lte)
- Unary: neg, not/lnot, inc, dec
- Stack: drop, dup, swap, nip

This enables factorial and other recursive math functions to be
frozen with the trampoline (18x speedup without C stack overflow).

Tested: factorial(5/10/20) all pass correctly.
